description: Perform a Quality Assurance check on the Cairo capital city feature in the 'world_survey.gpkg' project. Calculate the deviation of Cairo's map coordinates from the Benchmark Control Point (Latitude: 30.0600, Longitude: 31.2500) using the formula: Deviation = Map_Value - Benchmark_Value. Create a new point in the 'field_observations' layer named 'QA_Log_Cairo' at Cairo's location. In the description field, record the calculated deviations rounded to 4 decimal places in the format: 'dLat: [val], dLon: [val]'.
